notes: Bosnia lose CB Tarik Muharemovic (suspended, red card vs Switzerland) and have Nidal Celik sidelined through injury, while Barbarez is expected to bring in Hadzikadunic at centre-back; Qatar are severely depleted with both Assim Madibo and Homam El Amin suspended after red cards vs Canada, leaving Lopetegui short of first-team quality in midfield, with Sultan Al Brake and Ahmed Fathy expected to deputise and Almoez Ali potentially replacing the misfiring Yusuf Abdurisag.
home_scorers: Edin Dzeko (veteran captain and leading striker, aerial set-piece threat)
Ermedin Demirovic (second striker, clinical finisher in the box)
Kerim Alajbegovic (set-piece taker, free kicks and corners)
away_scorers: Akram Afif (talisman winger, Qatar's creative focal point and set-piece threat)
Almoez Ali (record goalscorer, likely to start after Abdurisag's poor form)
Edmilson Junior (attacking midfielder, direct runner and goalscoring threat)
